about.summary: Passionate developer with 2 years of experience in software engineering and 3 years prior in a non-tech manufacturing role. I specialize in building internal tools, automating workflows, and creating data pipelines and dashboards for business teams. Currently focused on backend development, with a strong interest in systems design and scalable software.

experience.description: Building internal software solutions, data pipelines, and dashboards for cross-functional teams. Working closely with stakeholders to understand business needs and deliver full-stack applications following Agile practices.
highlights: Contributed to a full-stack web app for the marketing team to prepare and manage customer quotes
Contributed to a full-stack web app for the engineering team to define and manage process flows for new parts
Built a part traceability system using QR codes and barcode scanning to track parts across manufacturing stages (IoT)
Architected and built Microlight, a microservice-based web app that centralizes and handles all ETL tasks
Collaborated with multiple internal teams to gather requirements, write user stories, and deliver tailored software solutions
Documented new features and gathered feedback from internal clients to drive iterative improvements
Designed and maintained ETL pipelines to transfer data from CRM and ERP systems into a centralized data warehouse and data lakes
Built real-time data transfer systems to stream measurement data from inspection gauges into the data pipeline
Built and maintained analytics dashboards in Metabase to surface business insights from transferred data

experience.description: Internship focused on full stack web development.
highlights: Built and maintained features using React.js frontend
Developed backend APIs with Python and Django

experience.description: Operated CNC and VMC machines in a manufacturing environment, ensuring part quality and production efficiency.
highlights: Gained hands-on experience with CNC programming and mechanical engineering principles
Developed proficiency in SAP for production and inventory management
Applied quality management practices to inspect and maintain part standards
Collaborated with cross-functional manufacturing teams to meet production targets
Senior project: Machine learning-based recommendation system

projects.name: RoomGrub
projects.description: An easy to use open source expense spltting app with friends

interests: Teaching people about tech and coding on YouTube
